headline: Firefox is working on a rounded redesign with easy-to-find controls for privacy and AI
summary: Firefox is getting a major visual overhaul called 'Project Nova.' The redesign will feature rounded UI and easier access to privacy settings. Users can quickly disable all present and future AI features within the new settings.

headline: In desperate times, graduates find hope in humiliating tech CEOs
summary: Graduates are publicly booing tech CEOs praising AI at commencement ceremonies. Viral videos show students jeering speakers like former Google CEO Eric Schmidt. The executives appear surprised by the widespread student backlash against AI.

headline: Who gets to own the Luigi Mangione story?
summary: A judge ruled some evidence inadmissible in the UnitedHealthcare CEO killing case. A reporter captured footage of police detaining a supporter outside court. The incident sparked debate over press credentials and freedom.

headline: Philips’ new display has a screen on both sides
summary: Philips introduced a unique business monitor with screens on both sides. The 24B2D5300 display is designed for collaborative viewing across a desk. It offers a novel solution for sharing screen content without angling.

headline: Viture Beast XR Glasses
summary: Introducing the new Viture Beast XR Glasses. These glasses promise an immersive extended reality experience. Further details on features and performance are anticipated.

headline: Save 50% Off the Wolfbox X3 Pro 2.5K Dashcam Bundle During Amazon's Memorial Day Sale
summary: Get 50% off the Wolfbox X3 Pro 2.5K Dashcam Bundle. The dashcam features a high-rated Sony STARVIS 2 IMX675 sensor for low-light. This deal is part of Amazon's Memorial Day Sale.

headline: Expand Your Home Gym With This Yoleo Weight Bench for Just $39 During Amazon's Memorial Day Sale
summary: The Yoleo Weight Bench is on sale for just $39. This deal offers 30% savings compared to previous Amazon sales. Upgrade your home gym during Amazon's Memorial Day Sale.

headline: Stream as Fox McCloud in Star Fox With the Nintendo Switch 2 Camera, Now 45% Off for Memorial Day
summary: The Nintendo Switch 2 Camera is now 45% off for Memorial Day. Stream gameplay as Fox McCloud with Star Fox integration. Grab this deal to enhance your Switch gaming experience.

headline: Toilets and changing rooms must be used on basis of biological sex, guidance confirms
summary: New guidance mandates toilets and changing rooms based on biological sex. The directive follows a landmark Supreme Court ruling from last year. The policy aims to clarify usage rules for public facilities.

headline: Cheaper theme park tickets and children's meals as VAT to be cut for some attractions this summer
summary: VAT cuts will make theme park tickets and children's meals cheaper this summer. Chancellor Rachel Reeves announced measures to ease cost-of-living pressures. Families can expect savings on popular attractions.

headline: Late Queen was 'very keen' for Andrew to be given trade envoy role
summary: Newly released documents reveal Queen Elizabeth's wish for Prince Andrew. She was 'very keen' for him to take a 'prominent role' as a trade envoy. The papers shed new light on royal family decisions.

headline: Foden and Palmer to miss out on World Cup squad
summary: Phil Foden and Cole Palmer are reportedly excluded from the World Cup squad. Morgan Gibbs-White is also set to miss out on selection. Ivan Toney and Jordan Henderson are expected to be included instead.
